title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO SAN JOSE SUR IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TALIBON, PROVINCE OF BOHOL, TO BARRIO SANTO NIÃO.

chunks.text:
H. No. 16821 / 65 OG No. 26, 6575 (June 30, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5390, June 15, 1968 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO SAN JOSE SUR IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TALIBON, PROVINCE OF BOHOL, TO BARRIO SANTO NIÃO.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Barrio San Jose Sur in the municipality of Talibon, Province of Bohol, is hereby changed to Barrio Santo Nino.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 15, 1968.
